questions.sentence: As you transition into a senior or leadership role your focus shifts from just writing code to helping your team grow
Mentoring junior developers is a critical part of this responsibility
Effective mentoring involves more than just giving answers its about providing guidance and encouraging Socratic questioning to help them solve problems independently
You should focus on building their confidence by assigning challenging but achievable tasks and offering constructive criticism during code reviews
By investing in the growth of your teammates you not only improve individual performance but also contribute to a healthier more collaborative and high performing engineering culture
